import { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import { LogOut, User, Search, Filter, Heart, TrendingUp, Mountain, Compass, Wallet, Bell, Settings, ChevronRight, Calendar, CheckCircle, Users } from "lucide-react"; import { useNavigate, Link } from "react-router-dom"; import { useLogoutHandler } from "../hooks/useLogoutHandler"; import LogoutModal from "../components/LogoutModal"; const Dashboard = () => { const [user, setUser] = useState(null); const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true); const navigate = useNavigate(); const { handleLogout, handleStayLoggedIn, showLogoutModal, setShowLogoutModal } = useLogoutHandler(); useEffect(() => { // Check if user is logged in const checkAuth = () => { const token = localStorage.getItem("token"); const userData = localStorage.getItem("user"); if (token && userData) { const parsedUser = JSON.parse(userData); // Only allow tourists on this dashboard if (parsedUser.user_type === "tourist") { setUser(parsedUser); setIsLoading(false); } else { // Redirect non-tourists to login navigate("/login", { replace: true }); } } else { // Not logged in, redirect to login navigate("/login", { replace: true }); } }; checkAuth(); }, [navigate]); if (isLoading) { return (
); } // If user is NOT logged in, show landing page if (!user) { return (

How OffTrailNepal Works

Your journey to authentic Nepali adventures in three simple steps

1

Create Your Profile

Sign up as a traveler, guide, or host. Tell us about your interests and experience.

2

Discover & Connect

Browse trails, guides, and homestays. Connect directly with locals.

3

Start Your Adventure

Book your experience and embark on an authentic Himalayan journey.

Ready to Explore Nepal Like Never Before?
